items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Psycho?
items.explanation: Alfred Hitchcock is one of the defining characters in Psycho.

items.q: Which movie features the character Barry Jenkins?
items.explanation: Barry Jenkins is associated with Moonlight.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie 8 1/2?
items.explanation: Federico Fellini is one of the defining characters in 8 1/2.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie The Red Shoes?
items.explanation: Michael Powell and Emeric Pressburger is one of the defining characters in The Red Shoes.

items.q: The character Federico Fellini appears in Persona.
items.explanation: Federico Fellini appears in La Dolce Vita, not Persona.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie M?
items.explanation: Fritz Lang is one of the defining characters in M.

items.q: The character Jean-Luc Godard appears in Breathless.
items.explanation: Jean-Luc Godard is a key character in Breathless.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Park Chan-wook.
items.explanation: Park Chan-wook is strongly linked to Oldboy.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Paul Thomas Anderson.
items.explanation: Paul Thomas Anderson is strongly linked to There Will Be Blood.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Guillermo del Toro.
items.explanation: Guillermo del Toro is strongly linked to The Shape of Water.
